title: Betopper 4x100W LED Satge Lights, Upgraded Amber+Cool White COB Blinder Light, High CRI/RA(>95) DMX512 Spotlight, 4 Eye Matrix Disco Lights for Wedding Party Photostudio Theater, 1S
features: Super Bright & Realistic Effects: BETOPPER 4x100W stage spotlight featuring four 100W 1900K-6100K COB LEDs, powerful & versatile lighting. This COB par light delivers a pure, vibrant wash effect for natural-looking lighting. Four 100W COB sources unleash a massive 13,000+ lumens, stage lights ensuring your stage is brighter, and more impactful.

Versatile Control & High CRI: Designed for professionals, this disco lights provides Master-Slave, Auto Mode, and Sound Activation Mode. With high CRI/RA(>95), this blinder light maintains natural skin tones and vibrant hues at any brightness and color temperature. The Amber + Cool White LED combination expands the color temperature spectrum, delivering richer warmth, crisper whites, and a more immersive stage presence.

Durable & Quiet Performance: Built with efficient heat dissipation, low power consumption and long service life, this photography light ensures long-lasting, stable operation. The dj lights has 4 built-in cooling fans. The light tubes of the stage lights will automatically enter the noiseless standby mode when no signal is detected.

Suitable for Diverse Settings: Whether it's mounted on the ground or trusses or used on walls in indoor or outdoor environments, our LED par light is designed to adapt to various scenarios. From stage performances and DJ setups to photo studios, weddings, parties,and more,this dmx light is ideal for enhancing any event with its versatile lighting capabilities.

Premium Die-Cast Aluminum Build: The sleek black finish of this BETOPPER party light adds elegance to any event. With its powerful 4x100W output, the strobe light delivers uniform, shadow-free lighting for an immersive experience.
